news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025

holdings.infoBox: XV is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Simplify Government Money Market ETF stock at 76.16%, B 12/3/26 Govt at 14.02%, B 8/20/26 Govt at 6.94%, B 10/15/26 Govt at 5.46%, and Cash at 0.28%.

overview.description: The Simplify Target 15 Distribution ETF (XV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to provide monthly distributions at an aspirational 15% annualized rate and a flexible hedge. The fund pursues its objective by using US government securities and employing an income generating option spread writing strategy XV was launched on Apr 14, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.
